## What & why

<!-- One or two sentences. Link the issue: Closes #NNN -->

## Checklist

- [ ] PR title is a Conventional Commit (`feat: ...` / `fix: ...` / `docs: ...` / `chore: ...`)
      — it becomes the squash commit.
- [ ] Tests added/updated for behavior changes (`cargo test` passes locally).
- [ ] `cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings` and `cargo fmt --all -- --check` pass.
- [ ] No secrets, no personal data, and no AI-attribution trailers in commits or this
      description (see CONTRIBUTING.md).
